blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Dean — this is Julian and Mara from next door.

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: Are you here for the whole weekend?

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: So are we. The sunrise from the water side tomorrow morning is going to be something.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Dean was supposed to wake us all up for the sunrise last time.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: He set an alarm and then slept through it with the phone under his pillow.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: Marcus has been talking about this fire for two months.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: I said it would be good.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: You said it would be transformative.

blocks.prompt: Julian takes in the group. What does he notice first?

options.label: How easy Dean and Sophie are together.
